title: Custom Death Sound
description: Are you tired of the default player hurt sound playing when you die? This resource pack provides a dedicated, custom sound effect that ONLY triggers when your character reaches zero health.
body:
# 💀 Custom Player Death Sound

A simple, lightweight resource pack that gives players a unique, dedicated death sound effect without messing up standard damage sounds.

### ✨ Features
* **Isolated Death Sound:** Overrides ONLY the `entity.player.death` event via `sounds.json`. Taking fall damage, getting hit by mobs, or starving will still play the normal vanilla hurt sounds!
* **Cross-Version Compatible:** Originally designed for **1.21.11 (1.21.x)**, but fully supports a wide range of older and newer versions. (You can safely ignore the "incompatible" warning in older versions).
* **Multiplayer Friendly:** Completely Client-Side. You can use it on any multiplayer server, realm, or singleplayer world.

### 📦 Installation
1. Download the `.zip` file.
2. Place it in your `.minecraft/resourcepacks` folder.
3. Enable it in the game settings! (Load it at the top of your resource pack list to ensure priority).

### 🛠️ Easy to Customize
Want to use your own funny meme sound or dramatic explosion? Simply open the zip file and replace the `death.ogg` file located inside `assets/minecraft/sounds/custom/` with your own Vorbis `.ogg` file!
